hooks.name: Credential Blocker
hooks.description: Blocks commits containing hardcoded AWS credentials, passwords, API keys, or private keys

rules.description: AWS Access Key ID (format: AKIA + 16 alphanumerics)

hooks.error_message_template:
[terraform-standards] ❌ Credentials detected in staged files

File: {file}, Line {line}:
  {content}

Issue: {message}

Recovery:
  1. Remove the hardcoded credential from {file}
  2. Use one of these alternatives instead:
     - AWS provider variable: var.aws_secret
     - Environment variable: export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=...
     - AWS credentials file: ~/.aws/credentials
     - AssumeRole: Use IAM role with credentials provider
     - AWS Secrets Manager: Use aws_secretsmanager_secret resource
  3. Stage the corrected file: git add {file}
  4. Retry commit: git commit -m "..."

Reference: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-configure-quickstart.html
hooks.override_warning: WARNING: Using --no-verify bypasses security checks. Only use this if the detected credential is a false positive.
